mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notifications (id, user_id, title, content, type, related_task_id, is_read) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{type}, #{relatedTaskId}, #{isRead})
mapper.update: UPDATE notifications SET is_read = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE notifications SET is_read = 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notifications WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
